summary: Completed comprehensive UI testing of B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system 17-point UI/UX refinement. All features verified working correctly across Customer Portal, Sales Portal, and Admin Portal.

issues: Status shows 'Pending' instead of 'Order Placed' in Recent Orders section (minor inconsistency - Orders page shows correct 'Order Placed')

action_items: MINOR: Update Dashboard.tsx Recent Orders section to display 'Order Placed' instead of 'Pending' for consistency with Orders page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17-point UI/UX refinements verified. Customer Portal: Dashboard has no Total Spend, Plywood/Timber blocks clickable, Orders page shows 'Order Placed' status and 'Estimated' label for Plywood, date/item filters work, Invoices page shows only Timber with info banner, Order Detail shows 'Estimated Total' for Plywood with no Download Invoice button. Sales Portal: FastOrder has PLYWOOD/TIMBER toggle buttons, customer selection, 'Estimated' label in summary. Admin Portal: Orders V2 has 'Order Placed' status filter, Edit/Approve/Cancel buttons, Edit modal shows 'Estimated Total' for Plywood with no GST lines. Products V2 has dynamic thickness/size text inputs (no hardcoded dropdowns).

customer_dashboard_no_total_spend.details: Dashboard shows Plywood/Timber order counts only, no 'Total Spend' field

customer_dashboard_clickable_blocks.details: Plywood and Timber blocks are clickable Links to /orders?type=Plywood and /orders?type=Timber with 'View all' text

customer_orders_order_placed_status.details: Orders page shows 'Order Placed' status (renamed from Pending) in yellow badges

customer_orders_estimated_label.details: Plywood orders show 'Estimated' label next to price, Timber orders show 'Total'

customer_orders_date_item_filters.details: Filter icon expands to show From Date, To Date, and Product/Item Name filter inputs

customer_invoices_timber_only.details: Invoices page shows only Timber invoices with info banner: 'Invoices are generated for Timber orders only. Plywood orders use estimated pricing.'

customer_order_detail_estimated_total.details: Plywood order detail shows 'Estimated Total' in orange with note 'Final price confirmed after admin approval'

customer_order_detail_no_download_invoic.details: Plywood order detail does not show 'Download Invoice' button (only shown for Timber orders)

sales_fastorder_plywood_timber_toggle.details: FastOrder page has PLYWOOD (orange) and TIMBER (white) toggle buttons at top after customer selection

sales_fastorder_customer_selection.details: Customer selection screen with search, shows customer name, contact, phone, and pricing tier

sales_fastorder_estimated_display.details: Bottom summary bar shows 'Estimated:' label for Plywood orders

admin_orders_order_placed_status.details: Orders V2 page shows 'Order Placed' status filter button and badges (renamed from Pending)

admin_orders_edit_approve_cancel.details: Edit, Approve, and Cancel buttons visible for pending orders

admin_edit_modal_no_gst.details: Edit Order modal shows Sub Total and Estimated Total only - no CGST/SGST lines

admin_edit_modal_estimated_total.details: Edit modal shows 'Estimated Total' for Plywood orders with note '* Final price confirmed after admin approval'

admin_products_dynamic_inputs.details: Add Product modal has text inputs for Thickness (placeholder: 'e.g., 12 or 18.5') and Size (placeholder: 'e.g., 8x4 or 2.44x1.22') - no hardcoded dropdowns

admin_products_tier_pricing.details: 6-tier pricing inputs (T1-T6) with 'Auto-fill from Tier 1' button
